num.description: Comic number; the raw XKCD JSON API's num field.

link.description: Raw API field; usually empty string on most comics, occasionally a related URL.

news.description: Raw API field; occasional comic-specific news/announcement text, usually empty string.

transcript.description: Raw API field; plain-text transcript of the comic, empty string when not transcribed.

alt.description: Raw API field; the comic's alt/title-text (hover text).

img.description: Raw API field; absolute URL of the comic image.
